name: habeebs-skill
description: Research-grounded engineering methodology — a composable skill chain that grounds implementation in real production patterns rather than generic best-practices.

plugins.name: habeebs-skill
plugins.description: A Human layer you read — prior-art-research → draft-spec (writes the Design) → socratic-grill (sign-off) — then a Machine layer for the implementing agent — vertical-slice → tdd-loop → release. decision-record (ADR) fires only for one-way-door decisions, write-plan only for multi-phase work. Supporting primitives: verify-output (anti-slop gate before each tdd-loop commit), parallel-dev, deep-modules, using-worktrees, systematic-debugging, agent-factors-check, devex-review, security-audit, setup-habeebs-skill.
